_note: Golden IDS ONLY — never the golden rule text. This is the WHOLE class golden set (GOLD-01..12, denominator 12 per golden-set.md:76), not a sub-selection — exactly as bugratio.json lists BugRatioAnalyzer's whole set (GOLD-16..18). The golden text is sequestered in knowledge-gateway/docs/audit/golden-set.md and is read by ONE actor only — the spec-load agent (ADR-C placement layer) — never by the Cover or runner agent. This config is safe to feed into the clean-room spec-cover run.
_ruleOrderNote: ruleOrder is the validator's POSITIONAL firing order (Validate's first-violation-wins sequence of 7 rules, GeneratedSqlValidator.cs:227-303) — a DIFFERENT list from the 12-id golden CATALOG above. The GOLD-ids do NOT positionally map to ruleOrder: the L272 stray-literal rule (NoStrayLiteralThreshold = Rule 5 of 7) is GOLD-08, and GOLD-05 is RelationPolicy = Rule 2. Key the FP-labeler and the AC-6 fixture off the rule NAME / ruleOrder index, NEVER off a GOLD-id ordinal.
